title: David Normington’s blog
body: "FOI 4480     We have a received a request under the Freedom of Information Act 2000 for the following:     A full transcript of David Normington’s blog from the date of its launch up to 1.9.2006.     We released David Normington’s blog entries on 12 June 2007.        Date: Tue Jun 12 12:13:18 BST 2007  Full Document   David Normington’s blog (PDF file - 30kb)  "
